12 Month Warranty
This product is covered under Lenskart’s in-house warranty policy. Coverage and timelines are as follows: 1 Year Coverage: Metal frame breakage (joints/nose pads); rim split (TR90/Acetate – full rim); screw came out; corrosion/rusting; hinge detached (temple separates); loose frame; loose temple; loose nose tip; screw loose; lens coating peel-off; photochromatic not working; spotting on lens; wrong power (store/HTO error); lens pop-out (not repairable at store); alignment issue (unrepairable at store); lens crazing. 1 Year + 180 Days Coverage: Lens broken at punch hole (rimless). 6 Months Coverage: Frame discoloration; frame bent; hinge broken; frame coating peeling; brand logo detached/fallen; lens chipped (rimless). 14 Days Coverage: Frame scratch; temple scratch; size issue; wearing discomfort; tint issue.

About this item

  • About the Brand:- The Vincent Chase collection features some of the most stylish and trendy sunglasses for men and women. Available in a variety of colours and shapes, it ensures you always stand out with your unique style.
  • Frame Pattern: These Transparent Black Full Rim Square Sunglasses are crafted from TR90, a material known for being durable, flexible, and ultra-lightweight, ensuring all-day comfort for both men and women.
  • FRAME SIZE:- Large | Frame width: 145mm | Frame Height: 44mm | Frame Dimensions: (56-19-140)mm
  • Frame Style: With their sharp, defined angles, these square frames enhance your features and suit all face shapes and are perfect for any occasion.
  • Lens Technology: Featuring polarised and 100% UV rays (up to 400 nm), reduce glare, and offer enhanced clarity. Lightweight and impact-resistant for superior eye protection.

  • EMAIL DELIVERY ONLY: Download your extended warranty certificate by sharing your device details. The link is available under buyer/seller messages at www.amazon.in/msg and is also sent to your Amazon registered email ID
  • REPAIR OR REPLACEMENT GUARANTEE: We will either repair your device or give a replacement. The replacement device will be provided at the discretion of Onsitego on the basis of the depreciated value of your device
  • HASSLE-FREE SERVICE: ‘No Questions Asked’ Repair Policy | Zero-Paperwork Claims Process | Free Pick & Drop or At-Home Service
  • LIMIT OF LIABILITY: Onsitego liability is limited to the depreciated value of the device as detailed in our T&C document
  • HIGH-QUALITY REPAIRS: Service by Onsitego authorised service engineers with high-quality spare parts every single time.
  • EASY TO REQUEST SERVICE: Download the Onsitego app to raise a repair request within 10 seconds or visit our website. You can also call us or chat with us on 99205 99206
  • COVERAGE: The plan covers all defects & malfunctions under the original manufacturer’s warranty. The plan starts the day after the manufacturer’s warranty ends or on the 366th day from the date of device purchase, whichever is later. It does not cover physical or liquid damage, accessories, preventive maintenance or consumables. It also does not cover parts that are not covered under the standard manufacturer’s warranty
  • ELIGIBILITY: The plan can be purchased only for new devices bought on the Amazon platform and WITHIN 30 days of device purchase or before the expiration of the manufacturer's warranty, whichever occurs first. You can purchase this plan only for devices that have AT LEAST 1 Authorised Service Centre anywhere in India. The sum of the manufacturer’s warranty and extended warranty CANNOT EXCEED 5 YEARS. This plan does not cover products or devices purchased or used for COMMERCIAL purposes

Warranty Description This product is covered under Lenskart's in-house warranty policy. Coverage and timelines are as follows 1 Year Coverage: Metal frame breakage (joints/nose pads); rim split (TR90/Acetate – full rim); screw came out; corrosion/rusting; hinge detached (temple separates); loose frame; loose temple; loose nose tip; screw loose; lens coating peel-off; photochromatic not working; spotting on lens; wrong power (store/HTO error); lens pop-out (not repairable at store); alignment issue (unrepairable at store); lens crazing. 1 Year + 180 Days Coverage: Lens broken at punch hole (rimless). 6 Months Coverage: Frame discoloration; frame bent; hinge broken; frame coating peeling; brand logo detached/fallen; lens chipped (rimless). 14 Days Coverage: Frame scratch; temple scratch; size issue; wearing discomfort; tint issue. Exclusions: Nose bridge break; cracked lens (visible line)

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

Customers say

Customers find these sunglasses to be of good quality and excellent value for money, with fantastic polarized lenses that protect eyes from harsh sunlight. They are comfortable, with one customer noting they sit well on the nose bridge, and one mentioning they're suitable for both chubby and small face types. While some customers find the size perfect, others say it's a little big.

Customers find these sunglasses to be of good quality.

  • Chetan Sudhakar Sonar
    5 out of 5 stars
    The Vincent Chase VC S13973 sunglasses
    Reviewed in India on 6 April 2025
    Colour: Frame Black / Lens Grey
    Verified Purchase
    Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
    Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

    The Vincent Chase by Lenskart VC S13973 sunglasses are a stylish and functional option for those seeking a high-quality eyewear solution. With polarized lenses for glare reduction, 100% UV protection, and a modern square design, these sunglasses provide both fashion and practicality in one package. The large frame size makes them suitable for individuals with larger faces or those who prefer a bold, prominent look. They offer comfort, durability, and a premium finish at a reasonable price, making them a solid choice for both men and women.

    However, the VC S13973 may not be the best option for those with smaller faces or those who need sunglasses that don’t interfere with digital screens. Additionally, while the build quality is generally strong, the lenses and frame can show signs of wear if mishandled.

    Overall, these sunglasses strike a perfect balance between style, comfort, and UV protection, offering a great value for money while providing the reliability and durability expected from a brand like Vincent Chase.

    I am extremely disappointed to learn about Lenskart’s recent internal "Grooming and Uniform" guidelines. Prohibiting staff from wearing basic cultural and religious markers like bindis, tilaks, and kalawas—while specifically allowing symbols from other faiths—is a clear case of double standards and a lack of respect for Hindu traditions.

About this Item

  • About the Brand:- The Vincent Chase collection features some of the most stylish and trendy sunglasses for men and women. Available in a variety of colours and shapes, it ensures you always stand out with your unique style.
  • Frame Pattern: These Transparent Black Full Rim Square Sunglasses are crafted from TR90, a material known for being durable, flexible, and ultra-lightweight, ensuring all-day comfort for both men and women.
  • FRAME SIZE:- Large | Frame width: 145mm | Frame Height: 44mm | Frame Dimensions: (56-19-140)mm
  • Frame Style: With their sharp, defined angles, these square frames enhance your features and suit all face shapes and are perfect for any occasion.
  • Lens Technology: Featuring polarised and 100% UV rays (up to 400 nm), reduce glare, and offer enhanced clarity. Lightweight and impact-resistant for superior eye protection.

Product description

Black Full Rim Wayfarer Vincent Chase SPRING 21 VC S13973-C1 Polarized Sunglasses

Options Available

Colour

  • Frame Black / Lens Grey
  • Frame Blue / Lens Grey
  • Frame Tortoise / Lens Brown
